note: Per-resource cleared reserve from IEMOP's DIPC reserve results final (DIPCRF), per commodity (Fr contingency, Dr dispatchable, Ru/Rd regulation). Each hour is the first 5-minute interval (HH:05), the same interval the reserve offer books are taken at, so the cleared price is directly comparable to the reserve replay. hours[grid][commodity][h] lists [resource, scheduled_mw, price_php_kwh]; cleared_price is the schedule-weighted pool clearing price (uniform per pool); sched_mw the pool total. DIPCRF is the FINAL solve; rtd_schedule_gap_mw records how far each pool's final schedule sits from the real-time RTDSUM schedule (the final-run reserve revision), which is not gated. A day is refused only if the Luzon reserve book did not populate.
